title: Quick-Hot-Gram-Cromotropo QHGC Lugol Solution
author: Javier Antonio Benavides
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bf8fjrtn
materials: Let to dry at room temperature
Permanent fixation use xylene for 1 min

steps.title: Homogenize the sample well with a...
steps.instruction: Homogenize the sample well with a wooden toothpick in the container that contains it

steps.title: Make a grade spread of approximately...
steps.instruction: Make a grade spread of approximately 2 cm long by 2 cm wide, sliding the stick impregnated with fecal matter onto a new degreased, dry, or used but clean and scratch-free slide.

steps.title: Remove excess stool with a clean,...
steps.instruction: Remove excess stool with a clean, chopped wooden toothpick and repeat this procedure with another clean chopped toothpick, until the spread is as thin as possible and with the least amount of lumps of stool

steps.title: Fix the plate in absolute methanol for 5 min
steps.instruction: Fix the plate in absolute methanol for 5 min

steps.title: Let it dry at room temperature...
steps.instruction: Let it dry at room temperature to proceed with staining or store it in a box wrapped in absorbent paper until staining.

steps.title: Cover the spread with Crystal violet for 1 min
steps.instruction: Cover the spread with Crystal violet for 1 min

steps.title: Wash under running water to remove excess dye
steps.instruction: Wash under running water to remove excess dye

steps.title: Cover with an acid alcohol solution...
steps.instruction: Cover with an acid alcohol solution for 3 min until discolored

steps.title: Visualize under a microscope with immersion oil at 100X
steps.instruction: Visualize under a microscope with immersion oil at 100X

steps.title: Let to dry and cover with...
steps.instruction: Let to dry and cover with a cover slide and Entellan®
